user_request:
I want to create a table tracking AI companies that are actively hiring.

Columns needed:
- Company Name
- Website
- Is hiring for AI roles? (yes/no)
- Team size (approximate)
- Recent funding (last round)

Find about 10 companies across different AI sectors like research, healthcare, and enterprise.
Make sure to include both established companies and startups.

columns.name: Table Purpose
columns.description: The primary research objective and what entities this table will track

columns.name: Entity Type
columns.description: The category of entities being tracked (e.g., companies, papers, people, products)

columns.name: Primary Search Domain
columns.description: The main industry, field, or domain where entities are located
columns.validation_strategy: Identify the core domain from user requirements and cross-reference with industry classifications and taxonomy systems

columns.name: Number of Subdomains
columns.description: How many parallel search subdomains are defined for row discovery
columns.validation_strategy: Count distinct subdomains in search strategy; should be 2-5 based on search complexity

columns.name: Total Target Rows
columns.description: Total number of candidate entities to discover across all subdomains
columns.validation_strategy: Sum target_rows across all subdomains; typically 20-30 candidates to yield 15-20 final rows after deduplication

columns.name: ID Columns Count
columns.description: Number of identification columns that uniquely identify each entity
columns.validation_strategy: Count columns with importance='ID'; typically 2-3 columns for robust entity identification

columns.name: Research Columns Count
columns.description: Number of research/data columns that require validation and discovery
columns.validation_strategy: Count columns with importance='CRITICAL' and is_identification=false; should have corresponding validation strategies

columns.name: Primary Data Sources
columns.description: Main sources where entity data will be found (e.g., company websites, Crunchbase, academic databases)
columns.validation_strategy: Identify reliable primary sources for the domain; prioritize official sources over aggregators

columns.name: Search Query Quality Score
columns.description: Assessment of search query design for multi-row discovery (1-5 scale)
columns.validation_strategy: Evaluate queries for multi-entity yield; prioritize list/directory queries over single-entity queries; score based on expected entity count per query

search_strategy.description: Without specific user requirements, this search strategy demonstrates the framework for discovering research table configurations. The approach uses parallel subdomains to identify different types of research needs and their corresponding table specifications, enabling systematic discovery of appropriate entity tracking structures.

subdomains.name: Technology & AI Research Tables
subdomains.focus: Research tables tracking technology companies, AI/ML organizations, software platforms, and digital innovation entities
search_queries: how to create research tables for AI companies tracking
entity tracking table structure for tech startups
research database design for technology sector entities
column specifications for tracking software companies

subdomains.name: Academic & Scientific Research Tables
subdomains.focus: Research tables for tracking academic papers, researchers, institutions, publications, and scientific entities
search_queries: research table design for academic papers and citations
entity tracking structure for scientific publications
column specifications for researcher profiles and affiliations
database design for tracking research institutions

subdomains.name: Business & Market Research Tables
subdomains.focus: Research tables for tracking companies, market segments, business entities, funding rounds, and commercial organizations
search_queries: research table structure for company tracking and analysis
entity database design for business intelligence
column specifications for market research entities
tracking table design for startups and enterprises

subdomains.name: Healthcare & Life Sciences Research Tables
subdomains.focus: Research tables for tracking medical entities, biotech companies, clinical trials, healthcare providers, and pharmaceutical organizations
search_queries: research table design for healthcare companies and providers
entity tracking structure for biotech and pharmaceutical firms
column specifications for clinical trial tracking
database design for medical research organizations

subdomains.name: Government & Policy Research Tables
subdomains.focus: Research tables for tracking government agencies, policy entities, regulatory bodies, legislation, and public sector organizations
search_queries: research table structure for government agencies and policy tracking
entity database design for regulatory bodies
column specifications for legislation and policy entities
tracking table design for public sector organizations
